ValidationRule.description: Restricts users from being able to edit fields on the page layout, forcing them instead to use the 'Submit Update' button and gp through approval process
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( pro_Allow_Edit__c != TRUE, OR( ISCHANGED(Name), ISCHANGED(leaseworks__Account_Number__c), ISCHANGED(leaseworks__Financial_Institution__c), ISCHANGED(leaseworks__IBAN_Code__c), ISCHANGED(leaseworks__Bank_Identification_Code__c), ISCHANGED(leaseworks__SWIFT_Code__c), ISCHANGED(leaseworks__Routing_ABA__c), ISCHANGED(leaseworks__Country__c), ISCHANGED(leaseworks__Account_Currency__c), ISCHANGED(leaseworks__Bank_Branch__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Bank Account fields cannot be edited on the record page. Click 'Submit Update' to edit Bank Account information.
